CUI Category: PRVCY
LDC: DL ONLY
POC: MFPrivacy@usmc.mil

labels.text:
INSTRUCTIONS
WHERE ADDITIONAL SPACE IS NECESSARY TO COMPLETE ITEMS

NAME OF DEPENDENT
(Include full given name)

RELATIONSHIP
(if child, indicate step, adopted, ward or born out)
DATE ALLOWANCE CLAIMED FROM (If previously approved, give date of approval)
Furnish the following information concerning custodian of any dependent named above.
SECTION 4 MARITAL OF SERVICE MEMBER AND SPOUSE AND INFORMATION REGARDING SUPPORT/PATERNITY
Please read the Privacy Act Statement on back before completing the form
IF EITHER ANSWER ABOVE IS "YES", GIVE INFORMATION REQUESTED BELOW.
HAS PRESENT SPOUSE BEEN PREVIOUSLY MARRIED?
INFORMATION CONCERNING DISSOLUTION OF EACH FORMER MARRIAGE OF BOTH YOURSELF AND/OR SPOUSE (Continue on separate sheet if necessary)
NAME OF THE SPOUSE IN THE DISSOLVED MARRIAGE
IS THERE A COURT ORDER OR WRITTEN AGREEMENT IN EFFECT RELATIVE TO SUPPORT/MAINTENANCE/PATERNITY?
IF YES, STATE DATE AND PLACE (county and state) WHERE SUCH ORDER/AGREEMENT WAS ISSUED AND ATTACH A COPY.

cells.caption: ORGANIZATION AND STATION PREPARING THIS APPLICATION
FUTURE ADDRESS AND ETA IF TRANSER IS ANTICIPATED WITHIN 60 DAYS
DATE OF CURRENT ENLISTMENT/APPOINTMENT OR DATE REPORTING FOR ACTIVE DUTY (WHICHEVER IS LATER)
DATE OF LAST DISCHARGE OR DATE OF LAST RELEASE TO INACTIVE DUTY

labels.text: IF YES, LIST ALL AVAILABLE IDENTIFYING INFORMATION (Full name of natural parent, EDIPI, grade, type of service, branch of service, inclusive dates of active service, and full name of child(ren).
HAS NATURAL PARENT OTHER THAN CLAIMANT OF CHILD(REN) LISTED EVER BEEN A MEMBER OF ANY U.S. ARMED FORCE?
SECTION 5 NATURAL PARENT OF CHILD IN ARMED FORCES
IF YES, COMPLETE THE BLOCKS BELOW.
HAS YOUR SPOUSE EVER BEEN A MEMBER OF ANY U.S. ARMED FORCE?

I CERTIFY that all the above statements are true to the best of my knowledge and belief, and I consent to checkage against my pay for any allowances paid on laws and regulations. I will immediately inform my Commanding Officer of any change in the number and/or status of my dependents, whether it be the gain of additional dependents, or the loss of dependents.

By signing this form, I hereby authorize release of any information hereon or obtained as a result of the processing/adjudication of this application, to my claimed dependents or custodians thereof, to the extent necessary for the proper adjudication of benefits, entitlements and/or of my legal obligation to support my dependents.
Subscribed and sworn before me this
FOR USE BY COMMAND APPROVING AUTHORITY:
FOR USE BY UNIT DIARY CLERK:
FOR USE BY CMC APPROVING AUTHORITY:

cells.caption: (Typed Name and Grade of Commanding Officer)

checkboxes.caption: FORWARDED TO CMC (CODE MFP-1) FOR APPROVAL FOR DEPENDENT NUMBERS:

labels.text:
In accordance with the Privacy Act of 1974 (Public Law 93-579), this notice informs you of the purpose for collection of information on this form. Please
read it before completing the form.
AUTHORITY: 10 U.S.C. 5041, Headquarters, Marine Corps; 42 U.S.C. 10606 as implemented by DoD Instruction 1030.2, Victim and Witness Assistance Procedures; and E.O. 9397 (SSN) as amended; MCO 1751.3; and SORN M01070-6.
PURPOSE: To manage the Dependency Determination Program. Information will be used to facilitate eligible dependency claims for spouses, children (born of a marriage), stepchildren and adopted children.
ROUTINE USES: Information will be accessed by Dependency Determination Program authorized personnel with a need-to-know to meet the purpose. The complete list and explanation of applicable Routine Uses are published in the authorizing SORN accessible at https://dpcld.defense.gov/Privacy/SORNsIndex/DOD-wide-SORN-Article-View/Article/570626/m01070-6/.
DISCLOSURE: Voluntary; however, failure to provide required information may adversely impact the processing of dependency claims.
RECORD MANAGEMENT: This form shall be managed in accordance with record schedule 1000-47, “GRS 3.1 050 - Data Administration Records (Permanent)” of SECNAV M-5210.1.
